name: Nahar Medical Centre
description: Welcome to Nahar Medical Centre, a premier state-of-the-art medical and diagnostic facility located in Chandivali, Mumbai. At Nahar Medical Centre, your well-being is our top priority. From the moment you step in, you are greeted with warmth, hospitality, and a commitment to helping you return to optimal health.Our center offers a serene and calming atmosphere, designed to put you at ease. We provide comprehensive care with the support of a professional and confident team, ensuring a comfortable experience for all our patients. Our facility includes modern amenities such as Wi-Fi-enabled lounges and an in-house coffee shop, delivering a blend of healthcare and comfort.Part of the esteemed Nahar Group, a leading name in real estate since 1973, Nahar Medical Centre extends the Group’s commitment to quality and excellence into the healthcare sector. The Nahar Group, known for its top-tier residential and industrial developments, now brings the same dedication to improving the quality of life through superior healthcare services.Our team is focused on addressing your concerns with expert medical consultancy and empathetic interactions. Experience top-notch healthcare in a facility designed to make every patient feel comfortable and cared for. Our facility has state-of-the-art equipment's and forms the basis for all our diagnostic and medical reports , prayer room.The calm, serene atmosphere; the confident and professional staff, WIFI enabled lounges, the coffee shop, are all part of the 'Nahar Medical Center design'.
